items.summary: In the left panel of LocationMapExplorer.tsx, insert the TimeControls component directly below the Global Control button section, which itself sits below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls. No other layout elements, ordering, styling, or component positions in the left panel or elsewhere in the UI should be changed from v1153.

Ensure the TimeControls component retains its full original functionality: it must animate and display how the solar terminator moves across the 3D globe at different times of day, including Real, Hourly, and Yearly modes with play/pause controls. Wire up the time state from LocationMapExplorer so the terminator on the InteractiveGlobe updates in response to the time controls.
